zh.West Bretton, West Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓
zh.Yorkshire, North Yorkshire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭
zh.West Bretton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Dromsfield於1250年出生在英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓時，他的父親William Dromsfield25歲，母親Cecilia de Whitley24歲。他於1277年與Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.West Bretton, West Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾韋斯特 布頓
zh-hans.Yorkshire, North Yorkshire, England, Uni: 英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭
zh-hans.West Bretton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾韋斯特 布頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Dromsfield于1250年出生在英国越可爾韋斯特 布頓时，他的父亲William Dromsfield25岁，母亲Cecilia de Whitley24岁。他于1277年与Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Dromsfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dransfield
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Dronfield in Derbyshire, recorded in the Domesday Book as Dranefeld, from OE drān ‘drone’ + feld ‘open land’, or perhaps from Dransfield Hill in Mirfield, Yorkshire, although this name is more likely to derive from the surname than vice versa.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Dromsfield was born in 1250, in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Dromsfield, was 25 and his mother, Cecilia de Whitley, was 24. He married Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield in 1277, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Dromsfield est né en 1250, à West Bretton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Dromsfield, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Cecilia de Whitley, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield en 1277, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Dromsfield 1250 in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Dromsfield 25 und seine Mutter Cecilia de Whitley 24. Er hat 1277 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Dromsfield è nato il nel 1250 nel West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Dromsfield, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia de Whitley, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield nel 1277, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.West Bretton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウエスト ブレットオン
ja.lifeSummary: John Dromsfieldが1250年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエスト ブレットオンで生まれた時，父William Dromsfieldは25歳，母Cecilia de Whitleyは24歳であった。1277年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでMrs Cecilia Dromsfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Dromsfield(이)가 1250년 영국 요르크실르 웨스트 브레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Dromsfield(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia de Whitley(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1277년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

mn.Yorkshire, North Yorkshire, England, Uni: Cleveland, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Dromsfield nasceu em 1250, em West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Dromsfield, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia de Whitley, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield em 1277, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Dromsfield родился в 1250 г. в местности вест бреттон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Dromsfield было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia de Whitley, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield в 1277 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Dromsfield nació en 1250, en West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Dromsfield, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Cecilia de Whitley, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mrs Cecilia Dromsfield en 1277, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
